import threading
import pytest
from source import bitcount


def test_bitcount_terminates_and_counts_correctly():
    result = [None]

    def run():
        result[0] = bitcount(127)

    thread = threading.Thread(target=run, daemon=True)
    thread.start()
    thread.join(timeout=2)

    assert not thread.is_alive(), (
        "bitcount(127) did not terminate within 2 seconds — "
        "XOR bug (n ^= n - 1) causes an infinite loop instead of clearing the lowest set bit"
    )
    assert result[0] == 7, (
        f"bitcount(127) should return 7 (0b1111111 has seven 1-bits), got {result[0]}"
    )
